# Radiant InnovaTech — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org

# Radiant InnovaTech is a technology engineering firm headquartered in Accra, Ghana.
# Its flagship product is Radiant Nexus, an autonomous operational intelligence platform for security operations.

## Company

Radiant InnovaTech is a sovereign engineering firm founded and headquartered in Accra, Ghana,
near the University of Mines and Technology (UMaT). The firm builds industrial-grade digital
infrastructure and security systems for demanding environments. Its flagship product, Radiant Nexus,
extends that mission into autonomous security operations.

## Flagship Product — Radiant Nexus

Radiant Nexus is an AI-native, autonomous operational intelligence layer for the Security Operations
Center (SOC). It is NOT a SIEM and NOT an observability tool. Nexus continuously reasons across
telemetry, runs investigations end to end, builds persistent operational memory, and coordinates
specialised AI agents to assist analysts and execute supervised response.

- Autonomous investigation: each alert becomes a complete, evidence-backed case file in under 60 seconds
- Agentic reasoning: a reasoning core orchestrates specialised identity, cloud, endpoint and network agents
- Persistent operational memory: every investigation sharpens the next, adapting to your environment
- Supervised response: containment runs through human approval gates — explainable, reversible, logged
- Native integrations: AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, CrowdStrike, SentinelOne, Microsoft Defender, Okta,
  Active Directory, Splunk, Microsoft Sentinel, Datadog, Palo Alto Networks, Cisco Secure

## Engineering Services (Radiant InnovaTech)

- Network infrastructure design and deployment (LoRaWAN, fibre, LAN/WAN)
- Cybersecurity: AES-256 encryption, penetration testing, security audits
- Custom software development: web applications, internal tools, client portals
- AI integration: LLM-powered assistants, RAG pipelines, workflow automation
- Cloud infrastructure: AWS deployment, CI/CD, server hardening

## Sectors Served

- Enterprise security operations centers (SOCs) and MSSPs
- Financial services and banking
- Critical infrastructure and heavy engineering (gold mining sector, Western Region)
- Legal and professional services
- Academic institutions (UMaT and partner universities)

## Location

Accra, Ghana. Deployed across Ghana and beyond.

## Contact

Website: https://radiantinnovatech.com
Request a demo: https://radiantinnovatech.com/pages/contact.html
Join the pilot waitlist: https://radiantinnovatech.com/waitlist
